title: Scale PostgreSQL (CloudNative-PG) to 3-node HA cluster with connection pooling and automated backups
subtasks: Update the CloudNative-PG Cluster CR to set spec.instances: 3 for 3-node HA.
Configure synchronous replication for at least one standby to ensure no data loss.
Enable PgBouncer connection pooling (either as a sidecar or via built-in support).
Set up daily automated backups and WAL archiving to S3/R2 (configure backup section in Cluster CR).
Verify anti-affinity rules to ensure pods are scheduled on separate nodes.
Test failover by simulating a primary node failure and confirm automatic promotion.
Document new connection strings and pooler endpoints for downstream services.

title: Scale Redis/Valkey to HA with Sentinel and configure maxmemory policy
subtasks: Update the Redis/Valkey CR to enable Sentinel mode with 1 master and 2 replicas (3 pods total).
Deploy 3 Sentinel pods for quorum and automatic failover.
Configure maxmemory policy (e.g., allkeys-lru) and set appropriate memory limits.
Ensure anti-affinity rules to spread Redis pods across nodes.
Test failover by killing the master pod and verifying automatic promotion.
Update ConfigMaps/secrets with new Redis endpoints if needed.

title: Configure TLS certificates and Ingress for all public services using cert-manager
subtasks: Install and configure cert-manager with Let's Encrypt (or internal CA if required).
Create Certificate resources for all public domains (web frontend, Morgan, API endpoints).
Update Ingress resources (NGINX or Envoy) to use the generated TLS certificates.
Ensure HTTP to HTTPS redirection is enforced.
Test certificate issuance and renewal process.
Document certificate management and renewal procedures.

title: Configure Cloudflare CDN for static assets and web frontend
subtasks: Set up Cloudflare proxy (orange cloud) for the web frontend and static asset domains.
Configure cache rules for static assets (images, JS, CSS) with long TTLs and cache-control headers.
Enable Brotli compression and security headers (HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, etc).
Test CDN cache hit/miss and verify performance improvement.
Document CDN configuration and cache purge procedures.

title: Apply Kubernetes network policies to restrict pod-to-pod traffic
subtasks: Define default-deny ingress NetworkPolicy for each namespace.
Create allow-ingress policies for required service-to-service communication (e.g., app → PostgreSQL, app → Redis).
Allow ingress from Ingress controller/cloudflared to public services only.
Allow egress to DNS and required external endpoints.
Test network isolation by attempting blocked and allowed connections.
Document network policy architecture and update runbooks.

title: Configure OpenTelemetry Collector and Jaeger for production observability
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector as a DaemonSet or Deployment with production sampling rates (e.g., 1-10%).
Configure exporters to Jaeger and Prometheus.
Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage (e.g., PVC-backed Elasticsearch or ClickHouse).
Update all service deployments to export traces to the collector endpoint.
Verify traces are collected and persisted for at least 30 days.
Document trace sampling, retention, and troubleshooting procedures.

title: Implement SLO alerting rules for all critical services
subtasks: Define SLOs for each service (e.g., 99.9% availability, p95 latency < 500ms).
Create Prometheus alerting rules for SLO violations (availability, latency, error rate).
Integrate alerts with existing notification channels (Slack, email, PagerDuty).
Test alert firing and notification delivery.
Document SLO definitions and alert response procedures.
